provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: This Act may be cited as the Regions and Districts (Establishment Procedure) Act.

provisions.title: Application
provisions.content: This Act shall apply to Tanzania Zanzibar as well as to Mainland Tanzania.

provisions.title: Applicable procedure in establishment of Regions, Districts, etc.
provisions.content: The procedure laid down in this Act shall apply in all cases where the President— (a) on his own volition; or (b) upon the recommendation of— (i) the President of Zanzibar, in relation to areas in Tanzania Zanzibar; (ii) the Prime Minister, in relation to areas in Tanzania Mainland; (iii) any District or Regional authority through the Prime Minister, in relation to Mainland Tanzania and the President of Zanzibar, in relation to Zanzibar, intends to divide any area of the United Republic into a Region or a District or to vary their boundaries.

provisions.title: Notice of intention to establish Regions, Districts, etc.
provisions.content: (1) The President shall give or cause to be given a notice of intention to divide any area into a Region or a District or to vary the boundaries of Regions or Districts. (2) The notice given under subsection (1) of this section shall indicate the general direction of the boundaries, reasons for the proposed division or variation and such other matters as the President may deem necessary and shall call upon all interested or affected authorities and persons to lodge with him in writing any objections or other representations in such manner and within such period as may be prescribed in the notice. (3) Where any objection or other representation has been lodged pursuant to subsection (2) of this section, the President shall cause to be delivered to the authority or persons lodging the objection or representation an acknowledgement of receipt of the objection or representation.

provisions.title: Notice of intention to establish Region, District, etc., to be published
provisions.content: A notice of intention given under section 4 of this Act shall be published in the Government Gazette , and in at least one national newspaper and if available, in one newspaper circulating in the area to be affected by the proposed division or variation of boundary.

provisions.title: Regions, Districts, etc., to be established by Proclamation
provisions.content: (1) Where the President upon the expiration of a Notice given under section 4 to which no objection or other representation has been lodged, has considered any objections or other representations made, he may, by proclamation published in the Gazette , establish the proposed Region or District or vary the boundaries of such Region or District. (2) The Proclamation made under subsection (1) shall set out the name and the boundaries of the Region or District so established or the particulars of the boundaries of the Region or District so varied.

provisions.title: Proclamation to be laid before the National Assembly
provisions.content: As soon as possible after a Proclamation has been made under section 6 the President shall cause a copy of the Proclamation together with a copy of the notice given under section 4 of this Act to be laid before the National Assembly.

provisions.title: Existing Regions and Districts to continue
provisions.content: Notwithstanding the provisions of any law to the contrary, every Proclamation of a region or district made under Article 2(2) of the Constitution 1 of the United Republic prior to this Act, shall with effect from the date of coming into operation of this Act, be deemed to be a Proclamation of Regions and Districts made under this Act, and shall continue in force until it is amended, revoked or replaced by a Proclamation made in accordance with this Act. 1 Cap. 2 History of this document 31 December 2023 Chapter 397 Revised Laws 2023 Consolidation 31 July 2002 this version Chapter 397 Revised Laws 2002 Consolidation 05 August 1994 Commenced Related documents More documents like this one Subsidiary legislation Title Establishments of Districts Order, 2012 Government Notice 73 of 2012 Establishment of Regions (Amendment) Proclamation, 2002 Government Notice 367 of 2002 Establishment of District (Amendment) Proclamation, 2002 Government Notice 366 of 2002 Establishment of Regions Proclamation, 1963 Government Notice 450 of 1963 Establishment of Districts Proclamation, 1926 Government Notice 21 of 1926 Tangazo la Marekebisho ya Uundaji wa Wilaya la Mwaka, 2002 Government Notice 220A of 2002 Establishment of District (Amendment) Notice, 2002 Government Notice 220 of 2002 Establishment of District (Amendment) Proclamation, 2001 Government Notice 1 of 2002 [] [] [] [{"provision_eid": "sec_3", "citations": 1}, {"provision_eid": "sec_4__subsec_1", "citations": 1}, {"provision_eid": "sec_4__subsec_2", "citations": 1}, {"provision_eid": "sec_4__subsec_3", "citations": 1}, {"provision_eid": "sec_5", "citations": 1}] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
